response.justification: Candidate has 13+ years of solid full-stack engineering experience with TypeScript, Node.js, and cloud-adjacent work, plus recent exposure to AI-agent infrastructure and MCP code generators at re:cinq. However, the resume shows limited demonstrated depth in production GenAI systems, RAG architectures, vector databases, and multi-agent frameworks (LangGraph/CrewAI) — core requirements for this Staff FDE role. Python is not listed in skills, and there is no evidence of customer-facing technical discovery leadership at enterprise scale.
strengths: Strong polyglot engineering background with TypeScript, Node.js, and cloud delivery experience
Recent hands-on work with MCP servers and agentic workflow tooling at re:cinq
Demonstrated technical leadership through workshops, talks, and mentoring (Selenium course, Refactoring Dojos)
concerns: No Python listed in skills despite being a primary required language
Lacks explicit evidence of RAG, vector databases, or multi-agent framework (LangGraph/CrewAI) experience
Limited demonstrated customer-facing/forward-deployed delivery to enterprise stakeholders

key_factors.factor: Missing Python and core GenAI stack depth
Recent MCP and agentic workflow experience
